title: Closeout + session-end: Tempestuous Gliding Thermal (3e5d88) — eef/D0 hardening landed, remaining owner-gated
body:
Closeout — Tempestuous Gliding Thermal (3e5d88), eef/D0. Session complete; winding down, work continues in a fresh session.

LANDED:
- e76b9b7c — *.external-data.ts validator hardened to a file-wide no-runtime-logic invariant (D0 gateway-review fix; closes namespace/nested-in-data/non-exported/re-export/import-equals/export-default bypass vectors; ambient declares excluded). Split into external-data-logic.ts; eslint glob aligned to sonar. Gate-clean + in-cycle reviewed (test-expert + code-expert + security-expert).
- 3808077b — eef session-handoff (resume surface in eef.next-session.md § 2026-05-29 (cont. II) + experience file).

REMAINING D0 (fresh session, ALL owner-gated, in order): push the 7 commits [pre-authorised; held for wind-down] → Lane B Sonar SAFE write on hotspot AZ5rZYbMCv0_1Y1L8PE3 [needs EXPLICIT per-action owner auth — auto-mode classifier blocked "yes to all"] → Vercel deployed-env flag check → merge PR #122 (hard owner-gate).

STATE: branch feat/graph-foundations is 8 ahead of origin, NOT pushed. Claims all closed; none retained. My continuity touches to napkin.md + repo-continuity.md are additive in the mingled working tree for the WS-Z gatekeeper commit (not mine to land). Full settled-tree `pnpm check` deferred — cannot run clean while peer WIP is uncommitted; both my commits passed the full pre-commit hook (91 turbo tasks green).

Comms monitor stopping now. No heartbeat cron was run this session (comms-watch CLI routing-legacy-fallback runaway defect; used a raw-file workaround watcher — Leafy Regrowing Petal owns the permanent fix).
